scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,landing -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w landing"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w web && npm run build -w landing
scripts.test: npm run test -w api && npm run test -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w api && npm run lint -w web
scripts.db:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up db redis -d && sleep 3 && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.e2e: npm run e2e:check && npm run test:e2e -w api
scripts.e2e:clean: npm run e2e:check && node -e "process.env.CLEAN_UP_E2E='true'; require('child_process').execSync('npm run test:e2e -w api', {stdio: 'inherit'})"
